scenarios.notes: restart emitted stream-cold-restart reason=resume-without-baseline; this is designed MM behavior because only the cursor persists and the in-memory baseline does not. The restart leg proved the cold-restart fallback: fresh baseline rebuild, stream-health hold entered/cleared, stale-quote cancel sweep, zero divergence, and no duplicate fill telemetry; it did not exercise persisted-cursor catchup resume across process restart.
scenarios.scenario: MM process restart exercises documented resume-without-baseline cold-restart fallback, then rebuilds safely with no duplicate fill telemetry or persistent divergence
